summary: Iteration 35: Proof workflow + class actual-duration tracking + credit-blocking + grouped/filtered proofs + wallet date filters + live polling. Backend pytest: 13/13 PASSED. Verified: (1) /classes/start/{id} stores started_at_actual; (2) /classes/student-left/{id} only assigned student can call (403 for teacher and other students), idempotent (does not overwrite earlier timestamp); (3) /classes/end/{id} computes actual_duration_minutes = min(student_left, now) - started_at_actual (verified small-value duration when student left ~immediately); (4) /teacher/submit-proof stores SHA-256 screenshot_hash, overrides client meeting_duration_minutes with backend actual_duration, returns submission_count=1 first time, credit_blocked=False; (5) /counsellor/verify-proof rejection sets status=rejected and increments rejection_count; (6) /teacher/dashboard exposes latest_proof_status, latest_proof_admin_status, latest_proof_rejection_count, latest_proof_credit_blocked, latest_proof_rejection_reason on the conducted class; (7) Resubmission after rejection succeeds with submission_count=2, message contains 'resubmission', old proof archived to class_proof_history, rejection_count carried over (=1); (8) /counsellor/proof-history/{class_id} returns {current, archived[]} with len(archived) >= 1; (9) 2nd counsellor rejection sets credit_blocked=True; (10) 3rd resubmission carries credit_blocked=True forward; (11) Admin /admin/approve-proof on a credit_blocked proof: counsellor approves -> admin approves -> proof admin_status='approved' but teacher.earnings/credits UNCHANGED (credit-blocked respected). Frontend smoke: Admin login OK, wallet page shows full date filter chips (All/Today/7d/30d/90d/This Month/Last Month/This Year/Custom) on Payment Receipts. Proofs tab not directly clicked due to selector mismatch (shadcn tab role) but AdminProofsPanel code is wired (see /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.js). Other dashboard live-polling and counsellor proofs grouped view not testable without seeded counsellor login UI.

minor.issue: Admin approve-proof requires admin_status='pending' i.e. counsellor must approve first (sets admin_status). For an admin override scenario where counsellor never approved, the admin path is blocked with 'Proof not pending admin approval'. Confirm with product if admin should be able to bypass counsellor entirely.

latest_proof_rejection_reason falls back from admin_notes -> reviewer_notes -> ''. If a counsellor rejects without reviewer_notes, the teacher sees an empty reason banner. Consider defaulting to 'No reason provided' or making reviewer_notes required on rejection.

action_items: (MAIN AGENT SELF-TEST) Live UI verification for: (a) AdminDashboard Proofs tab shows grouped view by teacher+student with date filter chips, (b) side-by-side compare modal shows DUPLICATE/DIFFERENT badge, (c) CounsellorProofs grouped view, (d) TeacherDashboard Resubmit Proof CTA + rejection reason banner, (e) 15s live polling refresh on all dashboards. These require seeded counsellor + teacher + student in fresh DB.
(OPTIONAL) Decide whether admin can approve-proof when counsellor never reviewed (currently blocked with 'Proof not pending admin approval').
(OPTIONAL) Make counsellor reviewer_notes mandatory on rejection so teacher always sees a reason.
critical_code_review_comments: teacher.py _hash_screenshot strips 'data:' prefix and falls back to hashing the raw string if base64 decode fails — robust.
teacher.py submit_class_proof correctly archives previous rejected proof to class_proof_history before deleting from class_proofs; resubmit flow preserves audit trail.

teacher.py submit_class_proof carries forward rejection_count from previous record but does NOT increment on submission (only counsellor/admin reject increments). Correct — submissions don't count as rejections.

teacher.py submit_class_proof: credit_blocked computed as (rejection_count >= 2) at submit time. This means the 3rd submission already starts as credit_blocked=True, which propagates through future approvals. Correct per spec.
classes.py end_class: actual_duration uses min(now, student_left) which correctly handles teacher-stays-after-student-leaves. Floor is max(0, ...) so cannot go negative.
classes.py student_left endpoint: idempotent guard 'if not cls.get("student_left_at")' is correct.
classes.py student_left: 403 enforcement only allows assigned/enrolled student — verified via tests (teacher 403, other student 403).
counsellor.py verify_class_proof: sets credit_blocked=True only when new_rejection_count >= 2; correctly uses (proof.get('rejection_count') or 0) + 1 to compute.

admin.py approve-proof line 839 short-circuits if admin_status != 'pending' — this means admin can't approve a brand-new submission that hasn't been counsellor-reviewed (and can't reject either through this endpoint). Documented as minor.

teacher.py teacher_dashboard line 165: 'relevant' selection logic differs by duration_days (>1 -> today's proof; else first proof). Acceptable but could miss multi-day rejection states for non-today checks.
Wallet date filter chips component visible in screenshot — confirms /pages/WalletPage.js wiring with useDateRangeFilter hook is rendering.
All routes consistently exclude Mongo _id projection ({_id: 0}). No hardcoded URLs. All env-driven.

success_rate.frontend: smoke OK — wallet date filter chips render; admin dashboard loads; deeper live-UI of proofs grouped view + compare modal + 15s polling not verified due to fresh-DB without counsellor/teacher/student accounts

test_credentials: Admin: info@kaimeralearning.com / solidarity&peace2023 (works). Teacher/student/counsellor seeded via direct Mongo inserts with TEST_ prefix and session_TEST_ tokens. All cleaned up post-test.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed teacher, student, counsellor, other-student, paid+approved assignment, scheduled class today (start_time set ~1 min before now in IST so /classes/start passes time-window). Sessions inserted directly into db.user_sessions. All TEST_ data deleted in module-scope teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest is at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration35_proof_credit_blocking.py — covers full proof+credit-blocking lifecycle with TEST_ seeded users. Re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration35_proof_credit_blocking.py -v. The class start time-window check uses IST (UTC+5:30); test seeds a class with start_time = (now_ist - 1min). If test environment clock or timezone differs, regenerate. Frontend live UI for grouped/filter proofs panels and 15s polling NOT covered — main agent should self-verify after seeding a counsellor + paid student + class via admin UI. Wallet date filter chips already verified visually on /wallet page.
rca of the issue: N/A — all targeted features pass. Two minor design notes: admin/approve-proof gates on admin_status='pending' (counsellor must approve first, no admin bypass), and rejection_reason can be empty if counsellor omits reviewer_notes.
